summary: 1 new milestone (M22: Chat File Attachments), 10 stories (split from 8 for context window optimization). Adds file attachment support to chat with MinIO storage, AI content extraction (PDF text + vision fallback, image vision), prompt injection sandboxing, pipeline-extraction synchronization, and full frontend UI (upload + drag/drop + message display). Depends on M21. Verification passed: 10/10 functional, 19/19 NFRs covered. Two story splits: AI extraction (PDF vs image+orchestration) and frontend (upload vs display).

context.existing_milestones: M1-M16 (original platform, complete), M17-M21 (refactoring, complete). M22 appended as new feature milestone.

splits_applied.reason: PDF page-level logic and image processing are distinct code paths; pipeline synchronization is a separate orchestration concern

split_into: S9: Upload flow (API + hook + input + drag/drop)
S10: Display flow (message rendering + thumbnails + presigned URLs)
splits_applied.reason: Upload flow (~14k context) and display flow (~10k context) are independent; combined they exceed comfortable single-story scope for Claude Opus 4.6

next_commands.command: /pipeline_configurator Read handover at docs/05-milestones/handover.json. Generate pipeline configuration for M22.
